reviews.comment:
la parte del aca una verguensa. siendo socio del aca y habiendome quedado con un reno 9 viniendo de buenos aires a cordoba ni siquiera se fijaron que le pasaba al auto tampoco me dejaron dejarlo en el aca una noche. necesitas atencion mecanica no seas socio del aca comprate un auto nuevo o encomendate a dios si sos creyente porque esta gente gana el premio a los garcas del siglo.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA branch is a disgrace. Even though I'm a member and my Renault 9 was stranded on the way from Buenos Aires to Cordoba, they didn't even bother to check what was wrong with it. They wouldn't even let me leave it there overnight. If you need mechanical attention, don't be a member of ACA. Buy a new car or pray to God if you're religious, because these people deserve the award for the biggest crooks of the century.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNGM3bl93RRAB
